rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"kody2 may fail to push if the generated branch name is too long or contains invalid characters, but the actual file edits can still succeed on retry.","scope":"git/push"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"A failed commit/push doesn't necessarily mean the file edit failed; re-examining the artifact output can reveal the edit was actually applied.","scope":"pipeline/debugging"}]}
